free_text: Spectroscopic study of the radionuclide 21Na for the
astrophysical 17F(alpha,p)20Ne reaction rate
Main reference.
Preliminary results.
Department of Physics, Sungkyunkwan
University, Suwon 16419, Korea
Department of Physics, School of Natural
Science, Ulsan National Institute of Science and
Technology (UNIST), Ulsan 44919, Korea
The Holifield Radioactive Ion Beam
Facility.
Isotopically enriched (99.9%)
24Mg solid targets with thicknesses of 520 microg/cm2
and 516 microg/cm2, respectively.
A silicon detector array (SIDAR) which was
composed of four trapezoidal wedges of dE-E telescopes.
Light charged particles from the reactions were
identified by standard energy loss technique.
